entities.name: Frigicap
entities.raw_quote: Frigicap, cold and damp, masculine, where the angels of Mercury dominate.

entities.name: Northern part
entities.raw_quote: Northern part, where the angels of Saturn dominate, earth cold and dry

entities.name: Baxhatau
entities.raw_quote: Baxhatau, Gahatus, Caudes, Yarabal, Harit, Iesse, Rion, Nesaph, Naadob...

entities.name: Belzebut
entities.raw_quote: capud et corona principis vestri Belzebut vos venire et ventos vestros excitare constringat.

entities.name: Barthan
entities.raw_quote: Ubi est Barthan rex, ubi sunt Thaadas, [Caudas], Yalcal eius ministri?

entities.name: Formione
entities.raw_quote: Ubi est Formione rex, ubi sunt Guth, Maguth, Guthrin eius ministri?

entities.name: Iammax
entities.raw_quote: Ubi est Iammax rex, ubi sunt Carmox, Ycanol, Pasfran eius ministri?

entities.name: Sarabocres
entities.raw_quote: Ubi est Sarabocres rex, ubi sunt Nassar, Cynassa eius ministri?

entities.name: Harthan
entities.raw_quote: Ubi est Harthan rex, ubi sunt Bileth, Mylalu, Abucaba eius ministri?

entities.name: Abaa
entities.raw_quote: Ubi est Abaa rex, ubi sunt Hyici, Quyron, Zach, Eladeb eius ministri?

entities.name: Maymon
entities.raw_quote: Ubi est Maymon rex, ubi sunt Assaiby, Albunalich, [Haibalidech, Yasfla] eius ministri?

entities.name: incense and censer
entities.raw_quote: Then you should have incense and a censer, in which should be glowing charcoals

entities.name: seven equal swords
entities.raw_quote: the censer, the incense, 7 gladios equales, (1) si possis claros

entities.name: raising up of the winds
entities.raw_quote: in this way you should raise up the winds nine times.

summary: This chunk details the ritual procedures for 'raising up the winds' using specific circles, incantations, and elemental directions. It also provides instructions for the third day of operations, including required tools like swords and incense, and lists various kings and their ministers to be invoked on different days of the week.
key_passages: Then you should have incense and a censer, in which should be glowing charcoals, and you should put the incense over the glowing charcoals
the head and crown of your prince Belzebut compels you to arise and come.
The raising up of the spirits of the Sun, which should particularly be done on a Sunday.
the master should raise up the winds once, beginning with those which have dominion on that day, and he should have the Sign of the Lord in his right hand.
the most high, terrible, and awe-inspiring judgment of God binds you to appear and to obey me in all things.
